question.question: I give you my word that the committee {a1} the recommendations in the final draft.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (C2)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: I give you my word that the committee {a1} the recommendations in the final draft.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
Short promises, reassurance, and voluntary commitments are usually expressed with **will**.
Example: *I give you my word that the committee will not dilute the recommendations in the final draft.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Krótkie obietnice, zapewnienia i dobrowolne zobowiązania zwykle wyrażamy przez **will**.
Przykład: *I give you my word that the committee will not dilute the recommendations in the final draft.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
Короткі обіцянки, запевнення та добровільні зобов'язання зазвичай виражаються через **will**.
Приклад: *I give you my word that the committee will not dilute the recommendations in the final draft.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: I give you my word that the committee {a1} the recommendations in the final draft.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "does not" does not match the future form required in this sentence.
Example: *I give you my word that the committee will not dilute the recommendations in the final draft.*
